Field Help: When products are bought, they can be delivered to this warehouse
Short name used to identify your warehouse
The company is automatically set from your user preferences.

1 Step: Consume components from stock and produce.
              2 Steps: Pick components from stock and then produce.
              3 Steps: Pick components from stock, produce, and then move final product(s) from production area to stock.
When products are manufactured, they can be manufactured in this warehouse.
Routes will be created for these resupply warehouses and you can select them on products and product categories
Routes will be created automatically to resupply this warehouse from the warehouses ticked
Gives the sequence of this line when displaying the warehouses.
GUID of the default WarehousingLocation in Exact Online. Stored as a reference only — not resolved to stock.location because location migration was out of scope (x_aa_use_storage_locations = False).
True when this warehouse is flagged as the primary warehouse in Exact Online. Controls the Odoo sequence field: sequence=1 is set automatically when this flag is True.
Mirrors the Exact Online UseStorageLocations flag. False for all warehouses in the current migration — WarehousingLocations were not migrated.
